texto: Home is to be a safe place, a refuge for all who enter, a protection from the harm and storms of the world. Yet often or even daily we open our doors -- usually via television or the internet -- to ideas and images that can damage our faith, abuse our hearts and minds, sear our psyches, and tear apart our peace. Home should be a place where, behind its doors, one should expect to find protection and safety from all the harms of life, including voices that do not speak truth or wisdom. Only the foolish would invite just anyone to enter the door of their home.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sally Clarkson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Home is to be a safe place, a refuge for all who enter, a protection from the harm and storms of …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, home, inspiracional, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e inspiracao.

frase_original: Home is to be a safe place, a refuge for all who enter, a protection from the harm and storms of the world. Yet often or even daily we open our doors -- usually via television or the internet -- to ideas and images that can damage our faith, abuse our hearts and minds, sear our psyches, and tear apart our peace. Home should be a place where, behind its doors, one should expect to find protection and safety from all the harms of life, including voices that do not speak truth or wisdom. Only the foolish would invite just anyone to enter the door of their home.

texto: A challenging career suddenly seemed more productive to me because I could measure the results of my work. These precious little ones had endless needs. They were busy little sinful creatures who demanded all of my body, time, life, emotions, and attention! As much as I loved my children, I often felt like a failure. Surely someone else could do a better job with these precious ones than I. And what exactly was I supposed to be accomplishing anyway? Was I wasting my time? What had this husband, who professed to love me, done to me?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sally Clarkson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “A challenging career suddenly seemed more productive to me because I could measure the results of…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, motherhood, parenting pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e trabalho.

texto: I often must sacrifice my own needs and desires for the purpose of giving my children what they need and modeling for them the depths of Christ's love."...make myself available in the routine tasks and myriad interruptions of daily life b/c I believe it is God's will for me to serve my family through them.
